name: Number 99: Utopia Dragonar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>９９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>希</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>望</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホープドラグナー
name_jp_tl: Numbers 99: King of Wishes, Hope Dragnar
desc:
3+ Level 12 monsters
(Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number" monster that has a number between "1" and "100" in its name (this is treated as an Xyz Summon). The turn you activate this effect, other monsters you control cannot attack directly, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can change the ATK of the opponent's monster to 0. You can only use each effect of "Number 99: Utopia Dragonar" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Overlay Universe Emperor's Door Pack

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
